behavior: Maintained source, tests, scripts, manifests, and documentation are independently reviewed for missed correctness, ownership, dependency, duplication, and maintainability work before another major feature begins.
revision_scope: Read-only review of the committed cleanup baseline plus uncommitted state and evidence transitions.
changes: Closed the residual cleanup plan with its existing full-gate evidence.
Inventoried maintained source, tests, scripts, manifests, and documentation.
Reproduced and prioritized two correctness defects and six bounded repository-integrity concerns.
Rejected startup-path, frontend-orphan, transitive-dependency, roadmap-ownership, and intentional-integration-lane false positives.
Recorded a finite corrective plan that blocks another major feature stream without reopening broad cleanup.

commands.relevant_result: Locked dependency synchronization, harness checks, and three baseline smoke tests passed.
commands.caveat: The environment doctor reported local runtime-version differences from repository-owned baselines.

commands.relevant_result: Canonical state, plan, evidence, and startup-budget contracts passed after the review transition.
Repository architecture and ownership contracts passed.
commands.caveat: The review still found behavior outside those structural assertions.

commands.relevant_result: All six maintained production and test scopes reported zero duplicated lines and zero regions.
commands.caveat: The enforced window is 14 significant lines.

commands.relevant_result: All 824 script contract tests passed with zero skipped.
All 2,925 frontend tests passed; the report exposed the untested dashboard notification call path.
commands.caveat: Coverage percentages are diagnostic and are not repository pass thresholds.

commands.relevant_result: Frontend and script lint checks passed.
The standard strict Rust lint lane passed.
commands.caveat: A separate advisory complexity run identified the database initialization hotspot.

commands.relevant_result: The review detected generated coverage output and a disposable source-tree metadata artifact.
commands.caveat: Generated review output is removed after evidence capture; the source-tree artifact belongs to the active correction.

commands.relevant_result: Hard limits passed, but the advisory review list contained 407 files and was classified as saturated.
commands.caveat: No broad file splitting is recommended.

commands.relevant_result: The reviewed working diff had no whitespace errors before final evidence updates.
